title: Uruguayan Empanada Stir Fry
description: A fusion twist on traditional Chinese stir-fry using Uruguayan empanada dough and mirin for a sweet and savory flavor.

ingredients.name: Uruguayan Empanada Dough
ingredients.notes: available at most Latin American grocery stores

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add pork belly and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add bitter melon and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add mirin and soy sauce, and stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes.
Warm empanada dough according to package instructions.
Assemble the stir-fry by placing the cooked pork and melon mixture onto the empanada dough.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-circle shape, and press edges together to seal.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat, and cook empanada for 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
